_meta.notes: TPA -- everything varies by underlying plan. Must call for each patient.

criteria_source.notes: This payer has no published clinical criteria. Universal baseline provides contraindication checks for test TYPE selection (HST vs PSG) only. Does not gate authorization.

G0399.notes: If parent network uses G0399 (e.g., Aetna, BCBS, UHC)

parent_network_inheritance._description: EBMS is a TPA. When a parent network is identified (e.g., 'EBMS - Aetna', 'EBMS - Cigna'), EBMS inherits the parent's HST code, criteria, and submission rules. If no parent is identified, call to verify.
parent_network_inheritance.detection: OCR may extract parent network name alongside EBMS. Common patterns: 'EBMS - [Parent]', 'Administered by EBMS / [Parent] network', or parent network logo on card.
parent_network_inheritance.fallback: If no parent network identified, call EBMS directly to determine auth requirements, HST code, and submission method.

submission.notes: TPA with variable rules. Must call to verify auth requirements, HST code, and submission method.
